display_name: 8 SECRET FULLY FREE AI Coders/APIs: $0 AI Coding Workflow is here!
author: AICodeKing

parts: Introduction — Why free AI coding matters in 2026
Tool 2: Codex Free Tier (OpenAI Async Agent)
Tool 8: Qwen Code (Open Source Terminal Agent)
Bonus: Mistral Vibe / Devstral / Xiaomi MiMo + OpenClaw

key_takeaways: Stitch (Google Labs) — Free AI design tool for UI mockups, flows, prototypes before coding
Codex (OpenAI) — Free tier with ChatGPT Free/Go, async delegate-and-come-back workflow, works across app/CLI/web/IDE
Jules (Google) — Free tier, GitHub-task-oriented async agent, great for batch work (tests, refactors, docs)
Gemini CLI — Free tier: 60 req/min, 1000 req/day with Google account, open source, supports MCP, best $0 terminal agent
Gemini Code Assist — IDE companion to Gemini CLI, free tier for VS Code / JetBrains
Augment Code ('anti-gravity') — Free tier includes ALL features, unlimited tab completions, agent manager, browser integration, weekly rate limit
GitHub Copilot Free — 2000 code completions + 50 premium requests/month, easiest setup
Qwen Code — Open source, 1000 free requests/day with Qwen OAuth, terminal-first agentic
Xiaomi MiMo — Zero token cost provider for OpenClaw (V2 Flash Pro + Omni), wildcard free backend
Devstral — Free on Mistral experimental plan, good for open/experimental hacker route with OpenClaw
Recommended $0 stack: Stitch → Codex/Jules → Gemini CLI → Augment Code → Copilot Free → OpenClaw + MiMo/Devstral
